title: ophrys × vespertilio
intro: Ophrys × vespertilio, also known as the evening bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the Ophrys genus and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Ophrys × vespertilio are primarily derived from its flowers, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Ophrys × vespertilio is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is used to treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and respiratory problems.
